goal: Develop a Suno AI-generated music downloader tool that allows users to download and organize generated audio tracks locally or via cloud storage.

modules.name: Audio Generation Interface
modules.description: Provides UI for inputting prompts, selecting styles/models, adjusting parameters (length, genre), and initiating track generation using Suno API.

modules.name: Download & Export Module
modules.description: Handles downloading generated audio files from the backend service or direct URL links; supports formats like MP3/WAV with metadata preservation.

modules.name: File Organizer
modules.description: Automatically categorizes downloaded tracks by date, genre/style, prompt hash, and user preferences using a local file system or cloud folder structure.

modules.name: Authentication & User Management
modules.description: Manages login via OAuth (e.g., Google), stores download history per user securely in database with optional subscription tier support.

modules.name: Suno API Wrapper Service
modules.description: Encapsulates Suno's public or internal API for stable, rate-limited access; includes error handling and retry logic for generation requests.

modules.name: Quality Assurance & Testing Suite
modules.description: Validates download integrity (file size/type), checks organization accuracy, and tests edge cases like failed downloads or network timeouts.
